records.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka! Is there anything we can do?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't stand by and watch the coalition divisions suffer in vain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't stand by and watch the coalition divisions suffer in vain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't stand by and watch the coalition divisions suffer in vain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Maze Division Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down?! How can I be calm when I hear the screams of our comrades?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down?! How can I be calm when I hear the screams of our comrades?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down?! How can I be calm when I hear the screams of our comrades?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: While we're here discussing unimportant things, the lives of our comrades are being sacrificed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While we're here discussing unimportant things, the lives of our comrades are being sacrificed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While we're here discussing unimportant things, the lives of our comrades are being sacrificed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your frustration, but now is not the time to go rescue our coalition divisions!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand your frustration, but now is not the time to go rescue our coalition divisions!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand your frustration, but now is not the time to go rescue our coalition divisions!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Hive Control's analysis, the enemy is showing patterns of detecting <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color> wavelength and attacking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the Hive Control's analysis, the enemy is showing patterns of detecting <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color> wavelength and attacking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the Hive Control's analysis, the enemy is showing patterns of detecting <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color> wavelength and attacking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's detecting the Eternium Drive wavelength?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's detecting the Eternium Drive wavelength?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's detecting the Eternium Drive wavelength?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... Is the enemy's purpose to stop our dive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... Is the enemy's purpose to stop our dive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... Is the enemy's purpose to stop our dive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Philharmonic Hall</color> is the Counterside with the variable depth coordinates, where the depth is not fixed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Philharmonic Hall</color> is the Counterside with the variable depth coordinates, where the depth is not fixed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Philharmonic Hall</color> is the Counterside with the variable depth coordinates, where the depth is not fixed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to reach these coordinates, a guaranteed dimension jump in a dimensional ship is required.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to reach these coordinates, a guaranteed dimension jump in a dimensional ship is required.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to reach these coordinates, a guaranteed dimension jump in a dimensional ship is required.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the reason for the enemy targeting only the ships is to prevent the Administration's dive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the reason for the enemy targeting only the ships is to prevent the Administration's dive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the reason for the enemy targeting only the ships is to prevent the Administration's dive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But doesn't that seem strange?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But doesn't that seem strange?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But doesn't that seem strange?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The enemy ship above the atmosphere has gotten close enough to target our ships on the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The enemy ship above the atmosphere has gotten close enough to target our ships on the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The enemy ship above the atmosphere has gotten close enough to target our ships on the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How was the enemy ship not detected by the Administration's <color=#ffd34c>strategic satellite</color>?

records.m_Talk_FRA: How was the enemy ship not detected by the Administration's <color=#ffd34c>strategic satellite</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The identification signal received from the enemy ship is... showing up as that strategic satellite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The identification signal received from the enemy ship is... showing up as that strategic satellite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The identification signal received from the enemy ship is... showing up as that strategic satellite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a disaster. Is this a similar case to the Moderator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a disaster. Is this a similar case to the Moderator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a disaster. Is this a similar case to the Moderator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. We assume it is data corruption as the world's corruption rate rises.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. We assume it is data corruption as the world's corruption rate rises.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. We assume it is data corruption as the world's corruption rate rises.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll know for sure once we have access to the satellite, but it may be due to the prolonged exposure of Corruption rays remaining in space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll know for sure once we have access to the satellite, but it may be due to the prolonged exposure of Corruption rays remaining in space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll know for sure once we have access to the satellite, but it may be due to the prolonged exposure of Corruption rays remaining in space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is currently firing missiles toward the enemy beyond the atmosphere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is currently firing missiles toward the enemy beyond the atmosphere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is currently firing missiles toward the enemy beyond the atmosphere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But because of the strategic satellite's active defense system, shooting it down is not easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But because of the strategic satellite's active defense system, shooting it down is not easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But because of the strategic satellite's active defense system, shooting it down is not easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It also prohibits access to Administration aircraft that use Eternium Drive as their primary power source.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It also prohibits access to Administration aircraft that use Eternium Drive as their primary power source.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's practically impenetrable... It's as if the enemy ship is a fortified stronghold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's practically impenetrable... It's as if the enemy ship is a fortified stronghold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's practically impenetrable... It's as if the enemy ship is a fortified stronghold.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't overcome this situation, it will be impossible for us to infiltrate Philharmonic Hall.

8v?

8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time to explain!

records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time to explain!

records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about, Commander?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you supposed to go to space in less than an hour without gear from the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you supposed to go to space in less than an hour without gear from the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you supposed to go to space in less than an hour without gear from the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I borrowed a test space shuttle through someone I know! It's complicated to explain it all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I borrowed a test space shuttle through someone I know! It's complicated to explain it all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I borrowed a test space shuttle through someone I know! It's complicated to explain it all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't use Eternium Drive, so I'll be able to reach that hunk of junk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't use Eternium Drive, so I'll be able to reach that hunk of junk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't use Eternium Drive, so I'll be able to reach that hunk of junk!

records.m_Talk_DEU: If I succeed, you'll be able to rescue the coalition divisions in Philharmonic Hall!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I succeed, you'll be able to rescue the coalition divisions in Philharmonic Hall!

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's reckless, Alice! The chances of succeeding are slim to none!

But even if you are a Counter, your body can't possibly stand in space
8g

8g

root.m_Talk_FRA: While we're here discussing unimportant things, the lives of our comrades are being sacrificed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your frustration, but now is not the time to go rescue our coalition divisions!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is currently under orbital bombardment from beyond the atmosphere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Hive Control's analysis, the enemy is showing patterns of detecting <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color> wavelength and attacking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, four of the Administration's dimensional ships were consequently shot down one after the other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Philharmonic Hall</color> is the Counterside with the variable depth coordinates, where the depth is not fixed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the reason for the enemy targeting only the ships is to prevent the Administration's dive!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
